description: Register an IO manager that stores assets as Parquet files on a lakeFS repository (Git-for-data over S3-compatible storage)

resource_key.label: Resource Key
resource_key.description: Dagster resource key for this IO manager. Use 'io_manager' to make it the default.

prefix.label: Prefix
prefix.description: Key prefix within the branch, e.g. 'dagster/assets'

lakefs_access_key_env_var.label: LakeFS Access Key Env Var
lakefs_access_key_env_var.description: Environment variable holding the lakeFS access key

lakefs_secret_key_env_var.label: LakeFS Secret Key Env Var
lakefs_secret_key_env_var.description: Environment variable holding the lakeFS secret key

commit_per_materialization.label: Commit Per Materialization
commit_per_materialization.description: If true, commit the branch after every successful materialization

commit_message_template.label: Commit Message Template
commit_message_template.description: Format string for commit messages. Available substitutions: {asset_key}, {partition_key}, {timestamp}, {row_count}

name: LakeFS IO Manager
